summary: Completed comprehensive frontend-only testing of Sheeshmahal Jewellers website. Successfully verified conversion from full-stack to frontend-only application with JSON data sources and localStorage reviews.

integration_issues.issue: localStorage reviews clear between page navigations in testing environment, though form submission and localStorage saving works correctly
integration_issues.note: Core functionality works - form saves to localStorage and shows success. May be testing environment session isolation issue.

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories (4), featured jewellery (4), and reviews marquee (8)
Gallery page loads all 6 jewellery items from JSON with correct category filtering
Gallery filters work: All (6), Gold (3), Diamond (1), Silver (1), Platinum (1)
Contact page loads with review form and contact information
Review form submission saves to localStorage and shows success toast
About page loads with all sections and 4 value cards
Location page loads with Google Maps embed and contact details
Navbar navigation works across all pages (Home, Gallery, About, Contact, Location)
Footer renders with all links and content
Admin routes (/admin/login, /admin/dashboard) are inaccessible and show public content
JSON data loading works correctly for jewellery.json (6 items) and reviews.json (4 reviews)
Design remains identical with beautiful styling and responsive layout
